name: S2E4 无间道之夏
desc: 中考方向·陷阱猎人版配套题库 · 15 道单选（时态语态情态/从句非谓语/词汇辨析）。低生词、高选项迷惑；世界观：期末结束、闻浩无间道败走、初代弟子将归来。暗号 RETURN。

m5.q: By the time the final exams ended, Yue ___ her brother for months without knowing his secret.
m5.why: By the time+过去，信任发生得更早→过去完成 had trusted。

m5.q: The clever spy ___ by the light camp last week, and his whole plan fell apart.
m5.why: 上周被抓→一般过去被动 was caught。

m5.q: The moment the alarm rang, the false helper ___ through the back gate — nobody could stop him.
m5.why: escape 此处不及物，主动一般过去 escaped=逃走。

m5.q: Yue stared at the proof and went pale. “My own brother a spy? It simply ___ be true!”
m5.why: simply can't be true=绝不可能是真的（强烈否定推测）。

m5.q: Look up — the summer sun has ___ over the swamp, but the traitor is already gone.
___ at last by Mr. Wolf, the spy dropped his mask and fled the valley.
m5.why: Exposed=被识破(过去分词作状语，spy 与 expose 是被动关系)。

m5.q: ___ he was clever enough to fool the crowd, he could never fool Mr. Wolf.
m5.why: Though=尽管(聪明却骗不过老师)，让步。

m5.q: The traitor did not stop pretending ___ the whole truth finally came out.
___ that the game was over, the false helper turned and ran into the mist.
m5.why: Realizing=意识到(现在分词作状语，与主语主动、同时)。

m5.q: ___ how hard the spy had tried, he could not win the students' hearts.
m5.why: No matter how hard…=无论多努力(让步状语从句)。

m5.q: The victory party ___ Mr. Wolf quite a lot of money, but he said every coin was worth it.
m5.why: 物/事作主语 + cost + 人 + 钱。

m5.q: Wen Hao is gone, but who knows — the valley may meet ___ spy someday.
m5.why: another + 单数名词=另一个(泛指)。

m5.q: “Where's Yue?” “She has ___ to the swamp to look for clues — she isn't back yet.”
m5.why: has gone to=去了还没回，与‘还没回来’一致。

m5.q: News of the traitor spread fast and soon ___ every classroom in the school.
m5.why: reach 及物，直接接地点=到达/传到。

m5.q: The whole school found the spy story so ___ that everyone kept talking about it for days.
m5.why: story 令人兴奋→-ing 形容词 exciting。
